description: Raptive is a media and advertising technology company that helps creators and publishers monetize audiences and grow revenue. It also offers identity-related tooling for publishers, documented in its support center.
summary: Raptive exposes one known public MCP server, Raptive Food, at `https://chatgpt-recipe-app.production.raptive.com/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on raptive.com.
